clock_basis: SitRep #044 (1294 confirmed, data as of 2026-06-27) is the confirmed-case headline. Confirmed-death endpoint is SitRep #044 (362, data as of 2026-06-27) is the laboratory-confirmed death headline. Suspected-death and under-investigation stocks remain absent unless the current reviewed SitRep explicitly republishes them.

Snapshot-level visibility nowcast. Reporting completeness is delay-only (the gamma reporting-delay CDF); the suspect-queue positivity term carries zero weight (DATA_TERM_WEIGHT = 0.0), so it does not drive the completeness posterior. The cumulative suspected tier was retired 2026-06-02, so no cumulative suspected denominator feeds this surface.
C1 confirmable total retired under the C2 active-queue regime (2026-05-29 onward); the reporting-completeness fraction is kept as an input-only reference, not a current model output.
held_out_reason: C1 confirmable total (confirmed / reporting-completeness) is retired under the C2 active-queue regime; the completeness fraction is kept as an input-only reference, not a current model output.

clock_basis: Confirmed-death endpoint is SitRep #044 (362, data as of 2026-06-27) feeds the confirmed-only death-back-projection grid. The broader suspected-death register is not carried onto the current-cycle surface after the confirmed/suspected death-axis split unless a reviewed source republishes it.
Transmission plausibility uses the current reconciled confirmed headline count.

Per-health-zone confirmed attribution uses the reviewed INSP SitRep Table 1 (inrb-sitrep-044-2026-06-27): 35 source zones, of which 35 carry confirmed cases, attributing 1257 confirmed. The remaining 37 confirmed are the unallocated headline + cross-border attribution lag, held in the residual pending a coordinated zone-alias bridge and map-geometry expansion rather than smeared across source zones.
held_out_reason: Latest headline aggregate is not allocated into zone-attributed model rows until a reviewed cumulative health-zone table is available.
blocked_by: Per-health-zone confirmed attribution uses the reviewed INSP SitRep Table 1 (inrb-sitrep-044-2026-06-27): 35 source zones, of which 35 carry confirmed cases, attributing 1257 confirmed. The remaining 37 confirmed are the unallocated headline + cross-border attribution lag, held in the residual pending a coordinated zone-alias bridge and map-geometry expansion rather than smeared across source zones.

clock_basis: Module C2 active-queue lab-yield: a SIBLING diagnostic to the Module C (C1) reporting-completeness nowcast, never an input to it. Recent reviewed-SitRep lab positivity (flat Beta(1,1)) applied to the operational active-suspected queue (cases under investigation plus cases in isolation), added to confirmed. A known-queue yield within the response system, not reporting completeness, hidden community incidence, deaths, or future spread.
